news.title: Brent oil tops $110 again after Chinese ships are turned away from Strait of Hormuz
news.summary: Oil prices traded higher after U.S. President Donald Trump said Iran had allowed 10 oil tankers to pass through the Strait of Hormuz.

news.title: Markets now see the Fed's next move as a potential rate hike as inflation fears mount
news.summary: Traders in the futures market shifted the probability of a rate increase by the end of 2026 to 52% on Friday morning. The U.S. Federal Reserve is expected to raise its benchmark rate to a record-high of 1.5% in December.

news.title: TSA funding update: Senate advances DHS bill, tees up House vote to end government shutdown
news.summary: Funding for the Department of Homeland Security lapsed in February. The lapse led to chaos at airports. The government is now fully funded again.

news.title: Novartis shells out $2 billion for immunology biotech Excellergy, in second multi-billion dollar deal in a week
news.summary: The Swiss pharma giant is betting on a next-generation allergy treatment that may prove to work faster and better than anything currently on the market.

news.title: Iran war wipes out $100 billion from luxury stocks
news.summary: Middle East tensions come at a critical time in the luxury industry. Dubai in the UAE has been the biggest driver of growth in recent years.

news.title: My PayPal account received money from the Philippines with two phone numbers listed. I called them. Big mistake.
news.summary: “I know my information is on the dark web, and I have taken steps to be cautious,” she said. “I have taken measures to be careful,’ she said, “and I’m not alone.”

news.title: Uncertainty around Social Security, taxes and healthcare is bad for households — and the economy
news.summary: Workers and retirees are anxious when faced with unpredictable policies. Workers and retirees face an uncertain future under the new administration. The U.S. government is expected to announce new policies in the coming weeks.

news.title: An older relative wants to give my daughter $19,000 when she turns 18. I said no. Who’s right?
news.summary: “We don’t think it’s healthy for very young adults to have access to large sums of money without working for it,” he says.

news.title: Mortgage rates climb for the fourth week in a row — and they won’t drop back down until this happens
news.summary: Rates had fallen under 6% for the first time since 2022 just days before the start of Operation Epic Fury. Rates had fallen below 6% just days earlier before the operation began.

news.title: The two reasons higher oil prices may not trigger the inflationary spike that investors fear
news.summary: The economy is better suited to absorb higher energy costs, says Jim Paulsen. Paulsen: The U.S. is better positioned to deal with the cost of energy.
